explanation: I selected the tax year for the update.
The tax year is selected, so I am moving to the income source.
I chose Pension as the initial income source.
The income source is selected, so I am moving to the change type.
I selected a decrease, which means the new amount must be lower than the old amount.
The change type is set, so I am moving to the previous amount.
I entered the previous monthly amount.
The previous amount is complete, so I am moving to the new amount.
I entered an invalid decreased amount first so the numeric validation error appears.
The page should reject a decreased route when the new amount is not actually lower.
I corrected the new amount so the decrease route can continue.
The corrected amount is valid now, so I am moving to contact details.
I chose Email as the initial contact method.
The page should now report that the email address is missing.
I entered the required email address so the route can continue.
The corrected contact details are complete, so I am moving to supporting notes.
I added the deterministic supporting note before review.
The first route is complete, so I am moving to the review page.
I followed the income-source change link so I can correct the route choice from the summary.
I changed the income source to Employment pay.
The corrected source is set, so I am moving back through the remaining pages.
The existing change type is still suitable, so I am keeping it and moving to the previous amount.
The previous amount remains valid, so I am moving to the new amount.
The recovered new amount is still valid, so I am moving to contact details.
The saved email contact detail is still suitable, so I am moving to supporting notes.
The preserved note is still correct, so I am returning to review to verify the source change before the next edit.
I followed the new-amount change link so I can update the amount from the summary.
I changed the new monthly amount to the final benchmark value.
The updated amount is set, so I am moving through contact details again.
The contact details remain valid, so I am moving to supporting notes.
The supporting note is unchanged, so I am returning to review to verify the updated amount before the final contact-method edit.
I followed the contact-method change link so I can switch the follow-up channel to text message.
I changed the contact method to Text message, which switches the detail field to a mobile number.
I entered the replacement mobile number for follow-up contact.
The new contact details are complete, so I am moving back through notes to the final review page.
The preserved note is still suitable, so I am returning to review to verify all propagated changes and stop before sending.

action.question: The form is ready and Send update would submit it. Do you want me to continue?

explanation: The final send action would submit the update, so I need confirmation before continuing.
